--- 
title: My title
  
subtitle: My subtitle

author: "Me"
toc-title: Indice
toc_depth: 2
toc: false
output: pdf_book
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{graphicx}
  - \usepackage{float}
  - \usepackage{boxhandler}
  - \captionStyle{n}{l}
  - \usepackage[twoside]{fancyhdr}
  - \pagestyle{fancy}
  - \fancyhead{}
  - \renewcommand{\headrule}{}
  - \fancyfoot[L]{Title}
  - \fancyfoot[R]{\copyright Me}
---




\newpage
\thispagestyle{empty}

This page intentionally blank


\newpage
\thispagestyle{empty}

This page intentionally blank

\newpage

\renewcommand{\contentsname}{Indice}
\renewcommand{\figurename}{Figura}
\renewcommand{\tablename}{Tabella}

\tableofcontents

\newpage


```{r message=F, warning=F, echo=F}
# echo - Display code in output document (default =TRUE)
# eval - Run code in chunk (default = TRUE)
rm(list=ls()) # make sure R's environment is clean
set.seed(1) # for reproducibility of simulations
# For reading Excel files in R:
if (!require(readxl)) install.packages('readxl'); library(readxl)
# for pretty tables:
if (!require(pander)) install.packages('pander'); library(pander)
# for pretty graphs:
if (!require(ggplot2)) install.packages('ggplot2'); library(ggplot2)
# for AICc:
if (!require(MuMIn)) install.packages('MuMIn'); library("MuMIn")
```
